notes: Nine hireable employees. wage weekly · skill multiplies shift revenue · the LIFE is two lines and one mid-summer event (week) that pulls them off shifts and asks the manager a choice: COVER (morale +2, cash -wage) or INSIST (morale -2, they work). KSM shows every number. That is the whole schism.

staff.name: DEE
staff.life: night-school accounting · corrects your ledger without being asked · you let her
staff.event: DEE's final exam is friday. she asks for the week off in a tone that has already done the math on your answer.

staff.name: MARCUS
staff.life: band on weekends · loads the cooler like a drum fill · customers wait for it
staff.event: MARCUS's band got a friday slot in portland. real venue. he shows you the flyer before he asks anything.

staff.name: PETRA
staff.life: was assistant manager under the LAST manager · knows where everything is, including the bodies
staff.event: PETRA's old boss calls the store, twice, asking for her. she stands very still by the cooler. 'i need thursday,' is all she says.

staff.name: GUS
staff.life: sixty-one · retired from the mill · works for the company, meaning the customers
staff.event: GUS's knee gives out on a wednesday restock. he tells you it's fine standing in a way that isn't.

staff.name: LILY
staff.life: sixteen · first job · terrified of the till, fast on everything else
staff.event: LILY rings her first till error · $40 short. she confesses before you count, which is worth more than the forty.

staff.name: RAY
staff.life: drives the 101 truck route off-shift · knows every regular by their car sound
staff.event: RAY's truck breaks down mid-route. he can fix it with a week's wage or lose the second job. he doesn't ask. you hear it anyway.

staff.name: NOOR
staff.life: pre-med · flashcards taped inside the stockroom door · quizzes gus on ligaments
staff.event: NOOR's MCAT is monday. she scheduled herself anyway. you catch her asleep standing up by the magazines.

staff.name: CHUCK
staff.life: enthusiasm of three men · accuracy of half of one · the regulars adore him
staff.event: CHUCK reorganizes the entire candy aisle overnight, alphabetically, by his own alphabet. sales of the letter Q candy nobody knew existed: up.

staff.name: VAL
staff.life: worked six summers at six stores up the coast · never stays · never says why
staff.event: VAL gives notice for the end of summer, quietly, the way she probably always does. 'nothing personal. it's the coast. i work it.'
